title: Credential Phishing Response
description: Response playbook for a reported or detected credential-harvesting phishing campaign targeting employee mailboxes. Triggered by a user report, a mail-gateway alert, or a flagged sign-in anomaly.
author: Cognis Digital

steps.name: Confirm reporting channels are live
steps.description: Verify the phishing-report button and the abuse mailbox both route to the response queue, and that on-call analysts are paged.

steps.name: Stage takedown and reset tooling
steps.description: Confirm access to the mail-gateway quarantine console, the identity provider's session-revocation API, and the password-reset workflow.

steps.name: Triage the reported message
steps.description: Extract sender, reply-to, links, and attachments from the reported sample and detonate links in a sandbox.
steps.detection: Mail-gateway logs for the sending domain plus any URL-click telemetry from the secure web gateway.

steps.name: Hunt for credential entry
steps.description: Determine whether any recipient submitted credentials to the harvesting page.
steps.detection: Correlate proxy logs for the phishing URL with identity-provider sign-in events from new locations or impossible-travel patterns.

steps.name: Quarantine matching messages tenant-wide
steps.response: Purge all copies of the campaign from mailboxes using the sender, subject, and URL indicators; block the sending domain at the gateway.

steps.name: Revoke active sessions for exposed accounts
steps.response: Force sign-out and revoke refresh tokens for any account that submitted credentials, then require step-up authentication.

steps.name: Reset compromised credentials
steps.response: Reset passwords for affected accounts and rotate any application secrets the accounts could reach.

steps.name: Restore normal access and monitor
steps.response: Re-enable affected accounts after reset, then watch sign-in and mailbox-rule telemetry for recurrence over the next several days.

steps.name: Tune detections and brief staff
steps.description: Add the campaign indicators to blocklists, refine the impossible-travel rule, and share a short awareness note with employees.
